Describe the sequence of actions taken to prepare the new paper base starting from the page lift.
canonical_answer: At 12s, a hand lifts the decorated scrapbook page upwards; at 14s, a hand holds a tan sheet of paper vertically against a white background; at 16s, white glue is applied in a continuous zigzag motion on brown cardboard; at 18s, a paintbrush spreads the white paint across the paper surface.

question: Has the person wearing the dark patterned sleeve started applying paint through the rose stencil yet?
